name: Chillicothe Fitness & Racquet Club
description: Chillicothe Fitness & Racquet Club is a place to play pickleball in Chillicothe, OH. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, and water.

name: Garber Courts
description: Garber Courts is a place to play pickleball in Chillicothe, OH. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights, a pro shop or equipment store, and restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Yoctangee city park
description: Yoctangee city park is a place to play pickleball in Chillicothe, OH. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.
